content:
MODULE: cosmos.web.dynamic_ui
FILE: cosmos/web/dynamic_ui.py (356 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Dynamic UI Manager
=============================

Manages dynamic, expandable UI sections for the Cosmos web interface.
Supports collapsible panels, real-time updates, and interactive content.

"Good news everyone! The UI now responds to your every whim!"

CLASSES:
- SectionState(Enum): State of a UI section.
- UISection: A dynamic UI section with content and state.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- InteractivePanel: A panel containing multiple sections.
  Methods: def add_section(self, section: UISection) -> None
  Methods: def remove_section(self, section_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def get_section(self, section_id: str) -> Optional[UISection]
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- DynamicUIManager: Manages dynamic UI panels and sections for Cosmos.

Features:
- Create/update/de
  Methods: def on_update(self, callback: Callable)
  Methods: async def create_panel(self, panel_id: str, title: str, layout: str='vertical') -> InteractivePanel
  Methods: async def add_section(self, panel_id: str, section_id: str, title: str, content: str='', state: Sect
  Methods: async def update_section_content(self, panel_id: str, section_id: str, content: str, append: bool=Fa
  Methods: async def set_section_state(self, panel_id: str, section_id: str, state: SectionState) -> bool
  Methods: async def toggle_section(self, panel_id: str, section_id: str) -> Optional[SectionState]
  Methods: def get_panel(self, panel_id: str) -> Optional[InteractivePanel]
  Methods: def get_all_panels(self) -> list[dict]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_ui_manager() -> DynamicUIManager
- async def update_thinking_panel(content: str, append: bool=True)
- async def update_memory_panel(content: str)
- async def show_loading(panel_id: str, section_id: str)
- async def show_error(panel_id: str, section_id: str, error_msg: str)
